creator: belltb_bugs@proton.me
text:
This happened while building 
   'grpc_tools._protoc_compiler' extension
deep inside 'pip3 install -vvv -r src/python/requirements.txt' for this project: https://github.com/jim-olsen/StarlinkRemote

The source file /tmp/code_generator-74cbda.cpp is 7.9MBytes, so it is too large to attach here.
I can provide it offline if useful.
